overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking alongside a horse on a dirt path through open prairie. The scene is illuminated by a handheld lantern and moonlight, with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

events.description: character and horse pass by the large leaning tree on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path while leading a horse with the left hand and carrying a lantern that illuminates the ground

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, occasionally swishing its tail and matching the walking pace

entered.detail: prominent gnarled tree with spreading branches leaning over the path
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky on the horizon
bright crescent moon visible through scattered clouds
worn dirt trail cutting through the prairie grass
tall dry yellow-brown grass covering the open plains

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. A large leaning tree dominates the right side of the frame as the character approaches and passes it, with distant mountains visible under a crescent moon.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the dirt path through open prairie, maintaining a steady pace beside the horse

notable_agents.action: horse continuing to walk alongside the character, tail swishing periodically

entered.detail: cluster of smaller trees visible in the distance on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large tree, the character continues walking through the open prairie with the horse. The landscape opens up with scattered trees visible in the distance on the right, while the dirt path stretches forward toward the distant mountains under the moonlit sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit prairie path that transitions from a sheltered passage by a large tree into a wide, open landscape. It begins with the character and horse walking along a dirt path, guided by the warm glow of a handheld lantern as they approach a massive leaning tree that dominates the right side of the frame. As the camera passes beyond the tree, the immediate surroundings expand, revealing a broader vista of the open prairie. The scene then opens further to show scattered trees dotting the distant right horizon while the path stretches forward toward the silhouette of mountains under a crescent moon.
